US: US1: As a coach who frequently messages clients, I want to save and quickly insert predefined responses in chats
AC: AC1: Add Saved Response button in Editor nav
Step:
1. Login as Coach
2. Open a conversation in Inbox
3. Verify Saved Responses button in Editor nav
Title: button placement
Expectation: - SHOULD display Saved Responses button next to GIF button in Editor nav

Step:
4. Hover over Saved Responses button
5. Verify tooltip
Title: hover tooltip
Expectation: - SHOULD show tooltip "Saved Responses"

Step:
1. Login as Coach
2. Open a conversation in Inbox
3. Click Saved Responses button
4. Verify Saved Responses modal
Title: popup shown on click
Expectation: - SHOULD display Saved Responses modal

Step:
3. Press Ctrl/Cmd + K
4. Verify Saved Responses modal
Title: popup shown via shortcut
Expectation: - SHOULD display Saved Responses modal via Ctrl/Cmd + K shortcut

Step: 5. Verify Create new button
Title: Create new button placement
Expectation: - SHOULD display Create new button in top-right corner of the modal

Step: 5. Verify empty state (no saved responses)
Title: empty state
Expectation: - SHOULD display empty state with image and text "Your saved responses list is empty. Start by creating your first one to save time during chats."

Step: 5. Verify list layout (with saved responses)
Title: left side titles list
Expectation: - SHOULD display list of saved response titles on the left side of the modal

Title: right side message detail
Expectation: - SHOULD display message detail of selected saved response on the right side

Title: default selection
Expectation: - SHOULD select the first saved response in the list by default

Step: 6. Verify FREQUENTLY USED section (no frequently used responses)
Title: FREQUENTLY USED hidden when empty
Expectation: - SHOULD hide FREQUENTLY USED section if no frequently used saved responses exist

Step: 6. Verify FREQUENTLY USED section (with frequently used responses)
Title: FREQUENTLY USED section
Expectation: - SHOULD display FREQUENTLY USED section with top 5 most-used saved responses sorted by usage_count descending, then title A-Z when equal

Step: 7. Verify ALL section
Title: ALL section
Expectation: - SHOULD display ALL section listing all saved responses sorted by title A-Z

Step: 8. Verify footer
Title: footer shortcuts
Expectation: - SHOULD display list of keyboard shortcuts in the footer

Step:
9. Hover over Create new button
10. Verify tooltip
Title: Create new hover tooltip
Expectation: - SHOULD display tooltip "Create New"

Step:
11. Use arrow keys Up/Down
12. Verify navigation
Title: arrow key navigation
Expectation: - SHOULD allow user to move between responses using arrow keys Up and Down

Step:
13. Hover over a saved response title
14. Verify message detail updates
Title: hover to preview
Expectation: - SHOULD display the hovered saved response's message detail on the right side

Step:
15. Hover over message detail area
16. Verify 3-dot button
Title: 3-dot on message hover
Expectation: - SHOULD display 3-dot button when hovering over message detail

Title: message detail scrollable
Expectation: - SHOULD allow scrolling if the message content is long

Step:
17. Scroll down to bottom of list
18. Verify Load more
Title: pagination load more
Expectation: - SHOULD display Load more and load next 20 items on scroll

Step:
19. Click X button
20. Verify modal closes
Title: X button closes modal
Expectation: - SHOULD close the Saved Responses modal

Step:
19. Press Esc
20. Verify modal closes
Title: Esc closes modal
Expectation: - SHOULD close the Saved Responses modal

Step:
1. Login as Coach
2. Open Saved Responses modal
3. Verify search box
Title: default state with placeholder
Expectation: - SHOULD display empty search box with placeholder "Search saved response"

Step:
4. Focus on search box
5. Verify placeholder changes
Title: focus placeholder change
Expectation: - SHOULD change placeholder to "Enter keyword..."

Step:
6. Input text in search box
7. Verify x icon appears
Title: x icon on input
Expectation: - SHOULD display x icon when text is inputted

Step:
8. Click x icon
9. Verify search box and list
Title: clear search restores full list
Expectation: - SHOULD remove search text and show back the full list

Step:
6. Type 1 character
7. Verify search triggers
Title: search from 1 character
Expectation: - SHOULD start searching from 1 character input

Title: search title and message match
Expectation: - SHOULD search based on title and message with case-insensitive partial matching

Step:
6. Search for non-existing keyword
7. Verify results area
Title: no results found
Expectation: - SHOULD display "Search results (0)" below search box

Step:
6. Search for existing keyword
7. Verify results area
Title: results count display
Expectation: - SHOULD display "Search results ({number_of_matched_results})" below search box

Title: results default selection
Expectation: - SHOULD select the first search result to view by default

Title: search results pagination
Expectation: - SHOULD apply pagination with 20 items per load and Load more on scroll

Step:
1. Login as Coach
2. Open Saved Responses modal
3. Hover over a saved response message detail
4. Click 3-dot button
5. Verify submenu
Title: submenu options
Expectation: - SHOULD display submenu with "Edit response" and "Delete response" options

AC: AC5: Add a new saved response
Step:
1. Login as Coach
2. Open Saved Responses modal
3. Click Create new button
4. Verify Create Saved Response popup
Title: popup shown
Expectation: - SHOULD display Create Saved Response popup with title "Create Saved Response"

Step: 5. Verify TITLE field
Title: Title field default state
Expectation: - SHOULD display required empty TITLE field with placeholder "Name this response for easy search"

Step:
6. Hover over info icon next to TITLE label
7. Verify tooltip
Title: Title field info tooltip
Expectation: - SHOULD show tooltip "Used to organize responses. This won’t appear in messages."

Step: 8. Verify MESSAGE field
Title: Message field default state
Expectation: - SHOULD display required empty MESSAGE field with placeholder "Write the full message you want to send to clients"

Title: Message field character counter
Expectation: - SHOULD display character count as "{X}/10000"

Step: 9. Verify Save button
Title: Save button disabled by default
Expectation: - SHOULD display Save button as disabled when fields are empty

Step: 10. Verify Cancel button
Title: Cancel button always enabled
Expectation: - SHOULD display Cancel button as always enabled

Step:
11. Input 140 characters in TITLE field
12. Try to input more characters
13. Verify TITLE field
Title: Title max 140 chars
Expectation: - SHOULD not allow input beyond 140 characters

Step:
11. Paste text longer than 140 chars in TITLE field
12. Verify TITLE field
Title: Title paste truncation
Expectation: - SHOULD cut off and paste only the first 140 characters

Step:
11. Paste formatted text in MESSAGE field
12. Verify MESSAGE field
Title: Message no text formatting
Expectation: - SHOULD clear text-formatting on paste and not allow text-formatting

Step:
11. Input 10000 characters in MESSAGE field
12. Try to input more characters
13. Verify MESSAGE field
Title: Message max 10000 chars
Expectation: - SHOULD not allow input beyond 10,000 characters

Step:
11. Paste text longer than 10000 chars in MESSAGE field
12. Verify MESSAGE field
Title: Message paste truncation
Expectation: - SHOULD cut off and paste only the first 10,000 characters

Step:
11. Input text in both TITLE and MESSAGE fields
12. Verify Save button
Title: Save button enabled when filled
Expectation: - SHOULD enable Save button when both TITLE and MESSAGE fields have input

Step:
13. Click Cancel button
14. Verify popup closes
Title: Cancel closes popup
Expectation: - SHOULD close the Create Saved Response popup

Step:
13. Click X button
14. Verify popup closes
Title: X button closes popup
Expectation: - SHOULD close the Create Saved Response popup

Step:
13. Click Save button
14. Verify result
Title: save success toast
Expectation: - SHOULD add new saved response and display toast "New Saved Response created."

Step:
1. Login as Coach
2. Open Saved Responses modal
3. Click 3-dot on a saved response
4. Click Edit response
5. Verify Edit Saved Response popup
Title: popup with pre-populated data
Expectation: - SHOULD display Edit Saved Response popup with title "Edit Saved Response" and pre-populated TITLE and MESSAGE fields

Step:
6. Click X button without making changes
7. Verify popup closes
Title: X close without changes
Expectation: - SHOULD close the Edit Saved Response popup

Step:
6. Make changes to a field
7. Click X button
8. Verify Discard Changes popup
Title: X close with changes shows discard
Expectation: - SHOULD show Discard Changes popup with title "Discard Changes?" and text "Are you sure you want to go? Changes have not been saved yet."

Step:
9. Click Cancel on Discard Changes popup
10. Verify returns to edit
Title: discard cancel keeps editing
Expectation: - SHOULD close Discard Changes popup and return to Edit popup

Step:
9. Click Discard Changes button
10. Verify popups close
Title: discard changes closes
Expectation: - SHOULD close both popups without saving changes

Step:
6. Edit TITLE or MESSAGE
7. Click Save button
8. Verify result
Title: save success toast
Expectation: - SHOULD update saved response and display toast "Saved Response updated successfully."

Step:
1. Login as Coach
2. Open Saved Responses modal
3. Click 3-dot on a saved response
4. Click Delete response
5. Verify confirmation popup
Title: confirmation popup
Expectation: - SHOULD display confirmation popup with title "Delete Response?" and text "This response will be permanently deleted and can’t be recovered. Are you sure you want to proceed?"

Step:
6. Click Cancel
7. Verify popup closes
Title: cancel closes popup
Expectation: - SHOULD close the confirmation popup without deleting

Step:
6. Click OK
7. Verify result
Title: OK deletes with toast
Expectation: - SHOULD delete the saved response and display toast "Saved Response deleted."

AC: AC8: Add saved response to chat box by selecting an item
Step:
1. Login as Coach
2. Open Saved Responses modal
3. Click on title of a saved response
4. Verify chatbox
Title: click title appends to chatbox
Expectation: - SHOULD append the full message content into the chatbox behind current text

Step:
3. Select a saved response
4. Press Enter
5. Verify chatbox
Title: Enter key appends to chatbox
Expectation: - SHOULD append the full message content into the chatbox behind current text

US: US2: As a coach, I want to create a saved response from a message in the conversation
AC: AC1: Add "Save this response" button to Coach's non-text message
Step:
1. Login as Coach on paid plan (Pro/Studio)
2. Open a conversation in Inbox
3. Hover over a Coach's non-text message
4. Verify Save this response button
Title: button placement
Expectation: - SHOULD display Save this response button between 3-dot and Reply buttons

Step:
5. Hover over Save this response button
6. Verify tooltip
Title: hover tooltip
Expectation: - SHOULD show tooltip "Save this response"

Step:
5. Click Save this response button
6. Verify popup
Title: click shows add popup
Expectation: - SHOULD display add new saved response popup

Step:
1. Login as Coach on Free plan
2. Open a conversation in Inbox
3. Hover over a Coach's non-text message
4. Verify message action buttons
Title: button hidden on Free plan
Expectation: - SHOULD not display Save this response button on workspaces without Saved Response feature permission

AC: AC2: Add new saved response from the conversation
Step:
1. Login as Coach on paid plan
2. Open a conversation
3. Hover over a Coach's non-text message
4. Click Save this response button
5. Verify popup
Title: popup title
Expectation: - SHOULD display popup with title "Add To Saved Responses"

Title: Title field blank
Expectation: - SHOULD display Title field as blank

Title: Message field pre-populated
Expectation: - SHOULD pre-populate the Coach's message into the Message field

Step:
1. Login as Coach
2. Open conversation with Coach's message longer than 10,000 characters
3. Hover message
4. Click Save this response button
5. Verify Message field
Title: long message truncation
Expectation: - SHOULD cut and fill the first 10,000 characters of the message into the field

Step:
6. Fill TITLE field
7. Click Save button
8. Verify result
Title: save success toast
Expectation: - SHOULD save the response and display toast "Response has been saved"
